requestedComponents.label: one yoke assembly
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Captain-side yoke, column, trim piece, and base as source candidates only.

requestedComponents.label: one throttle assembly
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Throttle quadrant levers, reversers, fuel cutoff levers, and pedestal mounting pieces.

requestedComponents.label: one large cockpit gauge
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: A complete analog gauge group with face, bezel, needle, digits, and hardware.

requestedComponents.label: one switch cluster
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: A credible switch/knob/lamp cluster from the source, not production-approved.
